findings.title: convergence_after has no computation step
findings.description: Plan Task 5 references convergence_after in Interspect context JSON but no step recomputes overlap_ratio after reactions complete.
findings.fix: Add Step 2.5.4b: re-run read-indexes, incorporate reactive additions, store convergence_after.

findings.title: Sycophancy data unavailable at emission time
findings.description: Evidence emission at end of Phase 2.5 references sycophancy_flags and discourse_health which are computed in Phase 3 synthesis.
findings.fix: Split into two events (Phase 2.5 mechanics + Phase 3 quality) or move all emission to post-Phase 3.

findings.title: findings-helper.sh read-indexes output format mismatch with convergence gate
findings.description: read-indexes outputs tab-separated lines, not structured data. Convergence gate requires parsing severity, deduplicating across agents, computing overlap_ratio — all as LLM-interpreted steps with no deterministic implementation.
findings.fix: Add convergence-gate subcommand to findings-helper.sh or document LLM-interpreted variance.

findings.title: No lifecycle management for reaction artifacts
findings.description: No resume semantics for interrupted reaction rounds. Stale agent outputs from interrupted Phase 2 can mismatch with new reactions.
findings.fix: Add timestamp verification in Step 2.5.0.5; consider --retry-reactions flag.

findings.title: Plan does not verify reaction file exclusion patterns
findings.description: Plan Task 1 validates read-indexes parsing but does not explicitly verify exclusion of *.reactions.md and *.reactions.error.md files.
findings.fix: Add exclusion pattern verification to Task 1 test criteria.

findings.title: Missing post-reaction convergence assessment (uchigumori stage)
findings.description: No measurement point after reactions where accumulated evidence crystallizes into a judgment. Convergence degradation after reactions (agents talking past each other) goes undetected.
findings.fix: Add convergence re-measurement; flag anomalous reviews where convergence_after < convergence_before - 0.2.

reactions.rationale: Reinforces EVIDENCE-01 from architectural perspective — missing feedback signal.

findings.title: No external audit of reaction quality (qadi role)
findings.description: No separation between reaction producer and reaction quality evaluator. Fabricated evidence (hallucinated file:line refs) passes with full weight in synthesis.
findings.fix: Add evidence field validation in Task 4 or Task 6.

findings.title: Feedback loop delay renders reaction evidence potentially stale
findings.description: 48h quarantine + counting-rule thresholds + infrequent reaction rounds = weeks before feedback influences routing. Garbage reactions persist undetected.
findings.fix: Document expected feedback loop latency; consider shorter quarantine for reaction evidence.

findings.title: No manifest/catalog of placed reactions
findings.description: No structured index of which agents produced reactions, which were skipped, and which errored. Synthesis must infer state from file presence.
findings.fix: Write reactions-manifest.json at end of Step 2.5.4.

findings.title: Sycophancy detection thresholds inert for typical agent populations
findings.description: agreement_threshold: 0.8 with 5-10 agents means even one dissent drops rate below threshold. Sycophancy detected only in trivial unanimous case already caught by convergence gate.
findings.fix: Calibrate for actual population (5-10 agents). Consider per-finding sycophancy or lower to 0.6-0.7.

findings.title: Minority finding preservation not verified in plan
findings.description: Plan Task 4 checks for reaction sections but not for minority finding preservation. No severity floor prevents P0/P1 findings from being suppressed by majority-disagree reactions.
findings.fix: Add minority preservation test to Task 6. Verify P0/P1 with net-negative reactions survive as contested.

findings.title: Lorenzen move taxonomy lacks partial-distinction for partially-agree
findings.description: partially-agree has no mapping in Move Type Assignment. Agents omit move type, producing null legality scores. Forces binary attack/defense when partial-distinction is more accurate.
findings.fix: Add partially-agree mapping to reaction-prompt.md or add distinction move type to discourse-lorenzen.yaml.

findings.title: Fixative timing not validated — LLM may parallelize dispatch steps
findings.description: reaction.md ordering is correct but interpreted by LLM, not executed as code. Parallelization could dispatch reactions before fixative computes.
findings.fix: Add fixative timing test to Task 3. Add explicit sequencing note in reaction.md.

findings.title: Single-pass enforcement not tested
findings.description: read-indexes correctly skips *.reactions files, but the plan does not test this property. No negative test for recursive reaction cycles.
findings.fix: Add negative test to Task 3: re-run convergence gate after reactions, verify reaction files excluded.

findings.title: Agent identity in reaction prompts enables reputation-anchoring
findings.description: Peer findings include agent identity, allowing agents to assess authority rather than evidence.
findings.fix: Consider stripping agent names from peer findings. Note as future experiment.

findings.title: Hearsay weighting may not be enforced in conductor score computation
findings.description: Convergent threshold (>50% agree) does not specify raw count vs weighted count. Hearsay-tagged agrees may still count toward convergence, making hearsay rule decorative.
findings.fix: Add integration test: finding with 2 hearsay-agree + 1 independent-disagree should be contested, not convergent.

improvements: Run baseline convergence measurement on existing review outputs before setting the 0.6 threshold
Fix flux-gen v5 character-per-line corruption in malformed agent files
Amend execution order to add Agent QA and Baseline steps before Task 1
Calibrate sycophancy thresholds for actual agent population sizes
Add minority preservation and hearsay weighting integration tests to Task 6
Add fixative timing, single-pass, and convergence degradation tests to Task 3
Split Interspect evidence emission into Phase 2.5 event + Phase 3 event
Write reactions-manifest.json for structured dispatch metadata
Document feedback loop latency for reaction evidence in Interspect pipeline
